200# return «

Fighter type: Mage

Introduced in: Special offer

 

Write a review Send to Discord

Rate this item


description 2/6

Bleeds, losing 10000 health every 3,5 sec and restoring 12000 health in all allies.

description 4/6

Bleeds, losing 15000 health every 3,5 sec and restoring 19000 health in all allies. Once in a while, sacrifices 15% of its max health and deals pure damage to its target equal to 300% of the health spent.

description 6/6

Bleeds, losing 23000 health every 3,5 sec and restoring 33000 health in all allies. Once in a while, sacrifices 10% of its max health and deals pure damage to its target equal to 500% of the health spent. Every 12 sec, Darkula deals distributed damage to all enemies equal to 320% of the damage taken within that period of time. Darkula restores his own health equal to 80% of the damage done by his attacks. When Darkula deals damage to himself, he has a 5% chance of healing himself by 75% and recharging all of his abilities (except artifacts).


Substance of Chaos

description 2/6

In addition to restoring allies’ health, Darkula deals magic damage equal to 2% of the target’s max health to a random enemy.

description 4/6

In addition to restoring allies’ health, Darkula deals magic damage equal to 2% of the target’s max health to a random enemy. The pure damage done by Darkula’s ability is also dealt in a small radius around the main target.

description 6/6

In addition to restoring allies’ health, Darkula deals magic damage equal to 2% of the target’s max health to a random enemy. The pure damage done by Darkula’s ability is also dealt in a small radius around the main target. When Darkula receives damage, they deal magic damage equal to 75% of that damage to a random enemy.


Substance of Greatness

description 2/6

In addition to restoring health, Darkula has a 25% chance to cast a shield on each ally that absorbs damage equal to 20% of the Darkula’s max health. The shield absorbs damage of any type and lasts for 3 sec.

description 4/6

In addition to restoring health, Darkula has a 25% chance to cast a shield on each ally that absorbs damage equal to 20% of the Darkula’s max health. The shield absorbs damage of any type and lasts for 3 sec. 50% of the health lost by Darkula is returned in the form of a shield absorbs physical damage.

description 6/6

In addition to restoring health, Darkula has a 25% chance to cast a shield on each ally that absorbs damage equal to 20% of the Darkula’s max health. The shield absorbs damage of any type and lasts for 3 sec. 50% of the health lost by Darkula is returned in the form of a shield absorbs physical damage. Darkula restores health to themself and all allies in the small radius around them equal to 80% of the Darkula’s damage.


Substance of Harmony

description 2/6

In addition to restoring health, Darkula has a 33% chance to remove a random negative effect from all allies.

description 4/6

In addition to restoring health, Darkula has a 33% chance to remove a random negative effect from all allies. Once in a while, Darkula reduces the healing received by all enemies by 66% for 5 sec.

description 6/6

In addition to restoring health, Darkula has a 33% chance to remove a random negative effect from all allies. Once in a while, Darkula reduces the healing received by all enemies by 66% for 5 sec. Once in a while, Darkula starts draining the health of a random enemy for 5 sec. Each second they drain 2% of the target’s max health. The target’s healing rate is also reduced by 65% for 10 sec.

Materials

Magic Ketchup
